ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 has Shipped!
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! Your order #123-4567890-1234567 has shipped and is on its way. The expected delivery date is 09 Apr 2026.

Order Summary:
- Echo Dot (3rd Gen) – $49.99
- Kindle Paperwhite – $129.99

Track your shipment: <URL>

If you have any questions, contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Microsoft 365 Password is Expiring Soon – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

Microsoft Security Team has detected suspicious activity on your account. To ensure uninterrupted access, please verify your password immediately. Your password will expire in 24 hours if not verified.

Click the link below to verify your account:
<URL>

Failure to verify will result in account suspension and loss of access to your documents.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Microsoft Security
